 All Submissions:

* [ ] Have you made yourself familiar with contributing guidelines at https://docs.trustgraph.ai/contributing/ ?
* [ ] Have you checked to ensure there aren't other open [Pull Requests](../../../pulls) for the same update/change?

<!-- You can erase any parts of this template not applicable to your Pull Request. -->

### New Feature Submissions:

1. [ ] Does your submission pass the tests?
2. [ ] Have you joined Discord and made yourself known to the maintainers?
3. [ ] Are you aware that you will be asked to agree to the CLI?  A bot will post instructions on your PR when you create it

### Changes to Core Features:

1. [ ] Have you joined Discord and made yourself known to the maintainers?
2. [ ] Have you discussed your change with the maintainers?
3. [ ] Have you updated tests for your feature?
4. [ ] Does your submission pass the tests?
5. [ ] Are you aware that you will be asked to agree to the CLA?  A bot will post instructions on your PR when you create it

### Fix

1. [ ] Does your submission pass the tests?
2. [ ] Are you aware that you will be asked to agree to the CLI?  A bot will post instructions on your PR when you create it
